text: Homepage | European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control Cruise ship hantavirus outbreak: ECDC response activated ECDC has deployed an expert from the EU Health Task Force to the cruise ship affected by the Andes hantavirus outbreak and published a threat assessment brief.
source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control

text: World Hand Hygiene Day 2026: Action saves lives This year, ECDC is publishing a guidance proposal to establish and implement infection prevention and control programmes in healthcare facilities and introducing hyFive, a digital hand hygiene monitoring tool for healthcare settings.
source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control

text: Call for abstracts for ESCAIDE 2026 now open Get the chance to share your research with the public health community in Europe and beyond. Deadline for submissions is 18 May.
source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control

text: Andes hantavirus outbreak: ECDC continues working on the frontline to support EU Member States 59 000 deaths: Europe off track for Sustainable Development Goal targets for HIV, tuberculosis, viral hepatitis, and STIs ECDC launches episomer, a tool that turns social media signals into early public health action From guidance to action: ECDC advances Infection Prevention and Control on World Hand Hygiene Day Eleventh external quality assessment scheme for Listeria monocytogenes typing in EU/EEA and EU enlargement countries, 2024 Rapid Scientific Advice on the management of passengers - In the context of the Andes virus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius Communicable disease threats report, 2-8 May 2026, Week 19 The European Respiratory Virus Surveillance Summary (ERVISS) ECDC collects, analyses and shares data on more than 50 infectious disease topics.
source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control

text: ECDC experts assess risks to Europe and provide guidance to help countries prevent and respond to outbreaks and public health threats.
source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
